message:
test(fcp-mesh,fcp-core,fcp-conformance,fcp-host): expand 12 low-coverage modules (+627 tests)

fcp-mesh: session(31→92), transport(44→96), replay(48→104), planner(62→109)
fcp-core: telemetry(36→103), health(56→172), connector_state(56→124),
          object(57→112), audit(71→122), enrollment(66→117)
fcp-conformance: harness(45→134)
fcp-host: error(57→107)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
